description.en: Send an on-chain signature request. The signer receives an email and signs the document with their wallet.
description.de: Sende eine On-Chain-Signaturanfrage. Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail und unterzeichnet das Dokument mit seiner Wallet.

description.en: On-chain document signatures. Send signing requests by email. All agreements anchored on the blockchain.
description.de: On-chain-Dokumentensignaturen. Signaturanfragen per E-Mail senden. Alle Vereinbarungen auf der Blockchain verankert.

warp.name: Signature: Create

description.en: Send an on-chain signature request. The signer receives an email and signs the document with their wallet.
description.de: Sende eine On-Chain-Signaturanfrage. Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail und unterzeichnet das Dokument mit seiner Wallet.

warp.bot: Creates an on-chain signature request and notifies the signer by email. Ask the user for the document title, a SHA-256 hash of the document, a link to the document, the signer's wallet address, the signer's email, and an optional deadline.

description.en: What document needs to be signed?
Who needs to sign this document?
Set a deadline for the signature request.

inputs.name: Title

description.en: Title of the document to be signed.

inputs.bot: Short, clear document title — e.g. 'Freelance Agreement Q2', 'NDA with Acme Corp'.

inputs.name: Document Hash

description.en: SHA-256 hash of the document. Proves the document hasn't been altered.
description.de: SHA-256-Hash des Dokuments. Beweist, dass das Dokument nicht verändert wurde.

inputs.bot: SHA-256 fingerprint of the document file. Generate with: sha256sum <file>.

inputs.name: Document

description.en: Upload the PDF document to be signed. The SHA-256 fingerprint will be computed automatically.
description.de: Lade das zu unterzeichnende PDF-Dokument hoch. Der SHA-256-Fingerabdruck wird automatisch berechnet.

inputs.bot: URL of the document to be signed. Accepts a public URL or an uploaded file URL.

inputs.name: Deadline

description.en: How long does the signer have to sign?
description.de: Wie lange hat der Unterzeichner Zeit zum Unterzeichnen?

inputs.bot: Deadline in hours. Use 0 for no deadline, 24 for one day, 168 for a week.

inputs.name: Signer Address

description.en: Wallet address of the signer.

inputs.bot: MultiversX wallet address (erd1...) of the person who needs to sign.

inputs.name: Signer Email

description.en: Signer's email address. They will receive a signing link.
description.de: E-Mail-Adresse des Unterzeichners. Er erhält einen Link zum Unterzeichnen.

inputs.bot: Email address of the person who needs to sign the document.

inputs.name: Signer Name

description.en: Signer's name (optional)

inputs.bot: Full name of the signer, used in the notification email.

success.en: Signature request sent! The signer will receive an email with a signing link.
success.de: Signaturanfrage gesendet! Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail mit einem Link zum Unterzeichnen.

description.en: Browse available time slots and book an appointment.
description.de: Verfügbare Zeitfenster ansehen und Termin buchen.

description.en: Appointment booking and intake flows for service businesses.
Browse available time slots and book an appointment.
description.de: Verfügbare Zeitfenster ansehen und Termin buchen.

en: Schedule a consultation with a service provider
Book a recurring weekly appointment for a client
Reserve a time slot on behalf of someone else
de: Eine Beratung bei einem Dienstleister vereinbaren
Einen wöchentlich wiederkehrenden Termin für einen Kunden buchen
Einen Zeitslot im Namen einer anderen Person reservieren

en.question: How do I book an appointment?
en.answer: Simply select an available time slot and provide your details to book an appointment.

en.question: Can I book an appointment for someone else?
en.answer: Yes, you can book on behalf of someone else by providing their contact details during the booking process.

de.question: Wie buche ich einen Termin?
de.answer: Wähle einfach einen verfügbaren Zeitslot und gib deine Daten ein, um einen Termin zu buchen.

de.question: Kann ich einen Termin für jemand anderen buchen?
de.answer: Ja, du kannst im Namen einer anderen Person buchen, indem du deren Kontaktdaten während des Buchungsvorgangs angibst.

description.en: Book a confirmed appointment slot for the current agent.
description.de: Bucht einen bestaetigten Termin fuer den aktuellen Agenten.

description.en: Appointment booking and intake flows for service businesses.

warp.name: Appointments: Book

description.en: Book a confirmed appointment slot for the current agent.
description.de: Bucht einen bestaetigten Termin fuer den aktuellen Agenten.

warp.bot: Use this only after running appointment-availability and the user has explicitly chosen a slot from the results. Never substitute this with direct calendar event creation — that skips booking policy, overlap checks, and attendee tracking. Always refer to bookings as 'appointments', never 'meetings'. The attendee is the person you are talking to — use their name and email from context without asking. Build a descriptive title combining purpose and name (e.g. 'Consultation with Anna Schmidt'). Pass exact start and end times from the chosen slot.

inputs.name: Appointment Title

description.en: Descriptive title shown on the calendar event

inputs.bot: Required. A descriptive title that identifies the appointment at a glance. Always combine the meeting purpose AND the attendee name, e.g. 'Consultation with Anna Schmidt', 'Demo call with Acme Corp', 'Tax review with John Doe'. Never use generic titles like 'Appointment' or 'Meeting'.

inputs.name: Scheduled At

description.en: Exact appointment start in ISO format

inputs.bot: Exact confirmed appointment start in ISO 8601 format.

inputs.name: Timezone

description.en: Appointment timezone

inputs.bot: Timezone identifier like Europe/Vienna, America/New_York, or UTC.

inputs.name: Service Slug

description.en: Optional configured service identifier
description.de: Optionaler Bezeichner fuer einen konfigurierten Service

inputs.bot: If the booking belongs to a configured service, pass the same service slug used for availability.

inputs.name: Routed Agent UUID

description.en: Optional staff agent UUID for routed bookings
description.de: Optionale UUID des Mitarbeiter-Agenten fuer geroutete Buchungen

inputs.bot: If appointment availability returned a specific agentUuid for the selected slot, pass it here unchanged.

inputs.name: Appointment Request ID

description.en: Optional linked appointment request id

inputs.bot: If this booking is fulfilling a previously created appointment request, pass that request id.

description.en: Full name of the person the appointment is for
description.de: Vollständiger Name der Person, für die der Termin ist

inputs.name: Attendee Email

description.en: The attendee email

inputs.bot: Email address of the attendee if available.

inputs.name: Notes

description.en: Optional notes or agenda

inputs.bot: Optional notes, context, or agenda to include with the appointment.

inputs.name: Conference Provider

description.en: Optional remote meeting provider

inputs.bot: Use 'google_meet', 'teams', or 'zoom' only if the user explicitly wants a remote meeting link. Otherwise leave empty.

description.en: We'll send your confirmation here.
Confirm the slot you've chosen.
Add a note or choose how you'd like to meet.
description.de: Füge eine Notiz hinzu oder wähle, wie ihr euch treffen wollt.
